title: colubrina asiatica var. pubescens
intro: Colubrina asiatica var. pubescens, also known as the hairy colubrina or Asian colubrina, is a plant species in the family Rhamnaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating fever. Colubrina asiatica var. pubescens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, for its medicinal use.
